case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NA VS. GLEN HILDEBRAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILDEBRAND, GLEN AN INDIVIDUAL $8,386.20 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,670.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17094026)
